# Studio Via Mentana

## What is this site?
A listing website for an elegant studio apartment available for short-term rental in Rome, Italy, via Airbnb.

## Key information
- Property: Studio apartment (monolocale)
- Location: Castro Pretorio neighborhood, Rome, Italy
- Available on: Airbnb
- Airbnb listing: https://www.airbnb.mx/rooms/1005789413503850183
- Virtual 360 Tour: https://kuula.co/share/collection/7MVhN

## Languages supported
Italian (default), English, Spanish, German

## Sections
- Hero: Embedded interactive 360° virtual tour (Kuula)
- Description: Studio features and amenities
- Location: Castro Pretorio neighborhood, nearby points of interest with distances
- Reviews: Guest reviews and ratings (translated per language)
- CTA: Direct link to Airbnb booking

## Amenities
- Refrigerator
- Full kitchen
- Private bathroom
- WiFi
- Cleaning products
- Towels & linens

## Nearby (Castro Pretorio, Rome) — distances from property
- Metro B – Castro Pretorio: 100m
- Via Volturno bus stop (lines 90, 92): 150m
- Bar San Pietro (café): 200m
- Biblioteca Nazionale Centrale: 400m
- Trattoria Monti (restaurant): 400m
- Metro A/B – Termini: 600m

## Full content
See /llms-full.txt for expanded content.
See /description.md, /location.md, /reviews.md for section-specific markdown.
